name: RippleClick
description: Adds a Material-style click ripple effect that emanates from the exact click position within any element.

children.description: Content to wrap with the ripple effect

slots.name: children
slots.description: The element that receives the ripple click effect

layout.description: Wraps children in a relatively-positioned div with overflow hidden. Ripple spans are absolutely positioned within.

aiPromptHint: Use RippleClick to add tactile click feedback to any element. Wrap buttons, cards, or list items. Set color to match your theme. The ripple emanates from the exact click position.

examples.title: Basic ripple on a button
examples.code:
<RippleClick className="rounded-lg">
  <button className="w-full rounded-lg bg-neutral-800 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-white">
    Click Me
  </button>
</RippleClick>

examples.title: Custom ripple color
examples.code:
Interactive Card

Click anywhere on this card

examples.title: Slow ripple for large surfaces
examples.code: Large interactive area
